name: Peanut Pork Schnitzels
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the peanut butter with the yogurt in a bowl.
2. Add the garlic, lemon juice, honey, and cumin to the bowl; stir until well combined.
3. Brush the seasoned mixture onto both sides of each pork schnitzel.
4. Place the schnitzels on a heated, greased griddle pan, grill, or BBQ.
5. Cook until browned on both sides and just tender.
